summary: Frontend testing of Capacitor-based Google and Apple Sign-In authentication. All features working correctly - buttons visible and clickable, Apple shows proper iOS-only error on web, Google redirects to Emergent Auth, session persistence works via localStorage, bottom navigation remains visible.
passed_tests: FRONTEND: Create Account page loads correctly with onboardingStep=1
FRONTEND: Page title 'Create Your Account' visible
FRONTEND: Email input field has data-testid='email-input'
FRONTEND: Password input field has data-testid='password-input'
FRONTEND: Google Sign-In button visible and clickable (data-testid='google-signin-btn')
FRONTEND: Apple Sign-In button visible and clickable (data-testid='apple-signin-btn')
FRONTEND: Apple Sign-In shows error 'Apple Sign-In is available on the iOS app. Please use Google Sign-In on web.'
FRONTEND: Auth error message has correct styling (red bg: rgb(254,226,226), border: rgb(254,202,202), text: rgb(220,38,38))
FRONTEND: Auth error message displays AlertCircle icon
FRONTEND: Login persists after page reload (localStorage onboardingStep=5, user data preserved)
FRONTEND: Bottom navigation visible with 4 tabs (Home, FAQ, Topics, About)
FRONTEND: Bottom nav CSS: position=fixed, bottom=30px, z-index=900
FRONTEND: Reset/Logout clears localStorage and returns to onboarding (step 0)
MOBILE: Create Account page displays correctly on 390x844 viewport
MOBILE: Google and Apple Sign-In buttons visible on mobile
MOBILE: Apple error message displays correctly on mobile
MOBILE: Bottom nav visible at y=741, within 844px viewport (not obscured)

success_rate.backend: N/A - Backend not tested per request

seed_data_creation: None - used localStorage to simulate auth state (onboardingStep=5, user JSON object)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Capacitor Google and Apple Sign-In authentication is implemented. On web: Google Sign-In redirects to Emergent Auth (https://auth.emergentagent.com/), Apple Sign-In shows iOS-only error message. Native Capacitor plugins (@codetrix-studio/capacitor-google-auth and @capacitor-community/apple-sign-in) are installed but only function in native iOS/Android builds. Session persistence uses localStorage with keys: 'onboardingStep', 'user', 'isAuthenticated'. Onboarding flow: Step 0=Disclaimer, Step 1=CreateAccount, Step 2=AgePregnancy, Step 3=DietaryConsiderations, Step 4=Premium, Step 5+=MainApp. The AuthContext.js provides useAuth hook but main App.js uses inline handlers for sign-in.
mocked_apis_note: MOCKED: Native Capacitor auth plugins (@codetrix-studio/capacitor-google-auth and @capacitor-community/apple-sign-in) only work when app is built as native iOS/Android app. On web, Google uses Emergent Auth redirect and Apple shows error message directing users to iOS app.
